steps.title: Focus on refuge size
steps.content: The student's goal is to indicate the size of the Massasoit NWR. The relevant note is that the refuge encompasses 184 acres.

steps.title: Include the acreage
steps.content: B focuses on management and limits on human activity, C focuses on location and the turtle habitat, and D focuses on the turtle and the managing agency. None states the size. The answer is A.
